data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to the subscription creation with a trial period. While there are successful prior steps related to customer sign-up and booking, none of these steps demonstrate the expected behavior of the subscription scenario as outlined in the exploratory step. This indicates a clear gap in the implementation of the required functionality for the trial period scenario.
gaps: No evidence of subscription creation with trial period validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
